words.meaning: a picture, video, or notice that tells people about something to buy
words.example: The advertisement showed a new language course.

words.meaning: the ability to give all your attention to something
words.example: Music can disturb my concentration while I study.

words.meaning: a public show of art, goods, or other things
words.example: Our class visited a science exhibition.

words.meaning: a tool or a thing used to make music
words.example: She learned to play a traditional instrument.

words.meaning: a group chosen to make plans or rules
words.example: The student council planned a school event.

words.meaning: the chance of something bad happening
words.example: Assess the risk before starting the task.

words.meaning: one form of something that is a little different from others
words.example: Please download the latest version of the app.

words.meaning: a person who buys something from a shop or business
words.example: The customer asked for a larger size.

words.meaning: the chance or right to use or enter something
words.example: Students need a password to get access to the site.

words.meaning: a large room where people watch a performance or listen to a talk
words.example: The speech contest was held in the auditorium.
